metadata.title: I'm Yours
metadata.album: Live From the Mountain Music Lounge, Volume 14

lyrics.text: Well you done done me in
But you're so hot that I melted
I fell right through the cracks
Now I'm trying to get back
Before the cool done run out
I'll be giving it my bestest
Nothing's going to stop me but divine intervention
I reckon it's again my turn
To win some or learn some
Well open up your mind and see like me
Open up your plans and damn you're free
Look into your heart and you'll find
Listen to the music of the moment
And it's our God-forsaken right to be
Do you want to come on,
And I will nibble your ear
I've been spending way too long
Checking my tongue in the mirror
Just to try to see it clearer
But my breath fogged up the glass
And so I drew a new face and I laughed
I guess what I be saying is
And just go with the seasons
It's what we aim to do
Well open up your mind and see like me
Open up your plans and damn you're free
Look into your heart and you'll find that
So please don't, please don't, please don't
This oh, this oh, this is our fate
